content: The current GTM strategy for AnimaOS relies on a land-and-expand model within enterprise accounts to minimize initial friction.
Middle management in target firms often resists the transition to an OS-based martech stack due to fear of losing tool-specific control.
Successfully reduced the product-to-market feedback loop from 4 weeks to 10 days during the Beta phase using iterative agile sprints.
KPI alignment is frequently undermined by conflicting incentives between the sales team's quota and marketing's lead quality goals.
